/usr/bin/x86_64-w64-mingw32-ar qc libFastNoise.a CMakeFiles/FastNoise.dir/FastNoise/FastNoise_C.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/FastNoise.dir/FastNoise/Metadata.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/FastNoise.dir/FastNoise/SmartNode.cpp.obj "../../../_deps/fastsimd-build/CMakeFiles/FastSIMD.dir/src/FastSIMD.cpp.obj" CMakeFiles/FastSIMD_FastNoise.dir/fastsimd/FastSIMD_FastNoise/FastSIMD_FastNoise_SSE2.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/FastSIMD_FastNoise.dir/fastsimd/FastSIMD_FastNoise/FastSIMD_FastNoise_SSE41.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/FastSIMD_FastNoise.dir/fastsimd/FastSIMD_FastNoise/FastSIMD_FastNoise_AVX2.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/FastSIMD_FastNoise.dir/fastsimd/FastSIMD_FastNoise/FastSIMD_FastNoise_AVX512.cpp.obj
/usr/bin/x86_64-w64-mingw32-ranlib libFastNoise.a
